reason: Browser use feature successfully executes browser commands through an agent and returns the expected page title "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing the Super Agent dashboard with three agents listed in the sidebar
Found and clicked agent "QA-20260418-000443-9ix6" - Agent page opened with chat interface, message input box, and sidebar with Crons, Connections, Skills, and Volumes sections
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input box - Message appeared in the text field
Clicked "Send message" button to send the request - Message was sent, agent status changed to "working", and session was created titled "Browser Navigation and Page Title Lookup"

Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) - Agent completed in 6 seconds, executing two actions: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title", both with checkmarks indicating completion
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" - Response clearly displayed: "The page title is "Example Domain"." - Test requirement met
